backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: removing music toggle logic from AppContext.tsx (autoplay-only) and removing the music toggle button from AppShell.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Concise per-file summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose, styling approach, and notable implementation details.
frontend/IMAGE_SLOT_INVENTORY.md: Documents all replaceable image slots across the app (13 timeline, 5 gallery, 3 journey) with their exact expected file paths under frontend/public/assets/.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Romantic Anniversary Website' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page navigation state with lazy-loaded pages, a heart animation transition overlay between pages, and a lock screen as the initial route.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Layout wrapper providing ambient romantic glow overlays, floating hearts background, and a single dark mode toggle button in the top-right corner — music toggle has been removed.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: Class-based React error boundary that catches rendering errors and displays a styled fallback UI with a refresh prompt instead of crashing the app.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Renders a fixed, non-interactive background layer of animated floating hearts (small, large background, and glowing dot particles) using inline CSS keyframe animations and deterministic positioning.
frontend/src/contexts/AppContext.tsx: Provides a React context with dark mode toggle state and auto-plays background music on mount, retrying playback on first user interaction if autoplay is blocked.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module that exports nothing, indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only application.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global Tailwind CSS setup along with a romantic OKLCH color palette, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and fixed gradient backgrounds for the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CountdownPage.tsx: Displays a live countdown timer to March 10, 2027 with animated flip-style units, floating heart background elements, and a button to proceed to the next page.
frontend/src/pages/CoupleQuiz.tsx: A multi-question couple-themed quiz component with 5 questions, answer selection, score tracking, heart burst particle animations on answer, and a results screen with a continue button.
frontend/src/pages/FinalPage.tsx: The final page of the experience featuring a celebrate button that triggers animated confetti, a popup message, and a restart option, with a fade-in entrance animation.
frontend/src/pages/HerJourney.tsx: A three-stage photo journey page (newborn, teenage, present) displaying real uploaded images with descriptive love-letter text for each life stage, with fallback emoji placeholders on image error.
frontend/src/pages/HeroPage.tsx: The landing hero page displaying a pulsing heart, a romantic anniversary message dated 10.03.2025, and a styled call-to-action button to proceed to the next page.
frontend/src/pages/LockScreen.tsx: A password-protected lock screen requiring the user to enter a specific date (10032025) to unlock the app, with shake animation on wrong input and a blurred background image.
frontend/src/pages/LoveLetterPage.tsx: An interactive love letter page with an animated envelope that opens on click to reveal a scrollable personal letter, with floating background hearts and a seal/close option.
frontend/src/pages/MemoriesGallery.tsx: A React photo gallery page that displays five relationship memory images in a grid with lightbox support, floating heart animations, and an error fallback placeholder for missing images.
frontend/src/pages/MonthPage.tsx: A React page that shows a detail view for a specific month in a relationship timeline, including a placeholder image, emoji, and a textarea for writing memories, with back and next navigation.
frontend/src/pages/TimelineOverview.tsx: A React page rendering a scrollable relationship timeline from March through February with per-month entries containing emoji, title, image slot, and narrative text describing key moments.
frontend/src/pages/WhyILoveYou.tsx: A React page that cycles through ten love reasons as animated cards, then transitions into a cinematic sequence with floating hearts and glowing infinity symbol after the last reason.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with a romantic color palette (rose, lavender, blush), custom fonts, box shadows, gradient utilities, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the full project state (version 55) for a multi-page romantic anniversary website for Sid & Krisha, including architectural notes, known issues (blank screen, missing assets, music not playing), and a list of all implemented features.
